item.name: Auth
item.description: User registration, login, profile, and logout endpoints

item.name: Register
item.description: Register a new user. Returns a JWT token.

response.name: 422 Validation Error

item.name: Login
item.description: Authenticate and receive a JWT token.

response.name: 401 Unauthorized — Wrong Credentials

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description: Refresh the JWT token before it expires.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Order CRUD endpoints. Orders can be filtered by status. Deletion is blocked if payments exist.

item.name: List Orders
item.description: List all orders with optional status filter and pagination.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, confirmed, cancelled
Filter by status: pending, confirmed, cancelled

response.name: 422 Invalid Status Filter

query.description: Filter by status: pending, confirmed, cancelled

item.name: Create Order
item.description: Create a new order. Total is auto-calculated from items.

response.name: 422 Validation Error

item.name: Get Order
item.description: Retrieve a single order by ID.

item.name: Update Order
item.description: Update an existing order. Recalculates total if items are updated.

item.name: Delete Order
item.description: Delete an order. **Blocked if the order has any payments.**

response.name: 422 Has Payments — Cannot Delete
response.body: { "message": "Order cannot be deleted because it has associated payments." }

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment processing and retrieval. Only confirmed orders can be paid.

item.name: List Payments
item.description: List all payments, optionally filtered by order_id.

item.name: Process Payment (Credit Card)
item.description: Process a payment using the Credit Card gateway. Order must be `confirmed`.

response.name: 422 Order Not Confirmed
response.body: { "message": "Payments can only be processed for orders with status [confirmed]. Current status: [pending]." }

response.name: 422 Invalid Payment Method

item.name: Process Payment (PayPal)
item.description: Process a payment using the PayPal gateway.

item.name: Process Payment (Stripe)
item.description: Process a payment using the Stripe gateway (demonstrates extensibility).

item.name: Get Payment
item.description: Retrieve a single payment by ID.
